title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: This JavaScript Mastery video covers techniques for implementing memory persistence in AI agents. The approach enables agents to retain and recall information across multiple interactions or sessions.
writeup: The video demonstrates techniques for adding memory persistence to AI agents so they retain and recall information across multiple interactions and sessions. This addresses a core limitation of stateless agents, which lose context once a session ends. The concrete focus is on memory systems and context management as the mechanism for carrying information forward between conversations.
